sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR, num_value DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, num_value) VALUES (1, 'test', 2.5), (2, '', 0.0), (3, NULL, 3.14159), (4, 'edge', -1.0);
SELECT id, md5(value || CAST(num_value AS VARCHAR)) AS hashed_value FROM test_data WHERE num_value ^ 2 > 4;
SELECT id, md5(CONCAT(value, ' - ', num_value)) AS composite_hash FROM test_data WHERE num_value > 0 HAVING LENGTH(md5(CONCAT(value, num_value))) > 5;
SELECT t1.id, md5(t1.value) AS t1_hash, t2.md5_hash FROM test_data t1 JOIN (SELECT id, md5(value) AS md5_hash FROM test_data WHERE num_value < 0) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, md5(value) AS value_hash FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, md5(CAST(num_value AS VARCHAR)) AS num_hash FROM test_data WHERE num_value > (SELECT AVG(num_value) FROM test_data) AND value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT DISTINCT id, md5(value) AS value_hash FROM test_data;
INSERT INTO temp_data SELECT id, md5(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR value <> '';
SELECT id, md5(value) AS multiple_hashes FROM test_data GROUP BY md5(value) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
